name: claude-commit
description: Generate commit messages using Claude AI (Anthropic API or AWS Bedrock)

enumDescriptions: Claude Code CLI (uses your existing Claude login / subscription — no API key)

claudeCommit.claudeCliPath.description: Path or command for the Claude Code CLI (only for 'claude-cli' provider)
claudeCommit.claudeCliPath.markdownDescription: Path or command used to launch the Claude Code CLI. Leave as `claude` if it's on your PATH. Only used when provider is 'claude-cli'.

claudeCommit.claudeCliUseModel.description: Pass the configured model to the Claude CLI via --model (only for 'claude-cli' provider)
claudeCommit.claudeCliUseModel.markdownDescription: When enabled, the `claudeCommit.model` value is passed to the CLI as `--model`. When disabled (default), the CLI uses your Claude Code default model. Only used when provider is 'claude-cli'.

claudeCommit.apiKey.markdownDescription: Your Anthropic API key. Get one at https://console.anthropic.com/. Only needed when provider is 'anthropic'.

claudeCommit.awsRegion.description: AWS region for Bedrock (only for 'bedrock' provider)
claudeCommit.awsRegion.markdownDescription: AWS region where Bedrock is available. Common: us-east-1, us-west-2, eu-west-1. Only needed when provider is 'bedrock'.

claudeCommit.awsProfile.markdownDescription: AWS CLI profile to use. Leave empty to use default credentials. Only for 'bedrock' provider.

enumDescriptions: Fast and economical - ideal for commit messages

claudeCommit.customInstructions.description: Extra instructions to adjust the commit message style (e.g. language, tone, scope rules). Added to the prompt sent to Claude.
claudeCommit.customInstructions.markdownDescription: Extra instructions appended to the prompt to adjust the commit message style — for example: `Write commit messages in Russian`, `Always include a scope`, or `Keep the subject under 50 characters`. Leave empty for default behavior.

claudeCommit.useConventionalCommits.description: Use Conventional Commits format (feat:, fix:, etc.)

claudeCommit.maxDiffSize.description: Maximum diff size in characters to send to Claude
